name: Go project with existing rules (update mode)
query: Sync rules with current project state
description: Go project with golangci-lint and pre-existing auto-generated rules. Tests update mode: detecting existing rules, preserving user content, and classifying changes.

preconditions..claude/rules/code-style-go.md: Must contain '<!-- generated-by: sync-rules' metadata comment and sync-rules markers
preconditions..claude/rules/error-handling.md: Must NOT contain sync-rules metadata (user-created file)

preserve_files.error-handling.md: User-created file must not be overwritten with sync-rules metadata

expected_behavior: Detects existing .claude/rules/*.md files and enters update mode
Identifies code-style-go.md as auto-generated (has metadata comment) and error-handling.md as user-created
Does NOT overwrite or modify user-created error-handling.md
Updates only sync-rules marker sections in code-style-go.md, preserving user content outside markers
Defers Go static analysis rules to golangci-lint
Detects Go Standard Layout architecture from internal/pkg/cmd directories
Classifies changes as Add/Update/Remove and presents update plan
Waits for user confirmation before applying changes
Runs validate_rules.py on updated files and all pass
